title: erigeron × hybridus
intro: Erigeron × hybridus, also known as the Santa Barbara Daisy or Fleabane, is a hybrid perennial plant species that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help treat various health issues such as wounds, eczema, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Erigeron × hybridus include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable natural remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
